title: 【4K】🇰🇬 Bishkek from Above 🔥 Capital of KYRGYZSTAN 2025 🔥 Cinematic Wolf Aerial™ Drone Film
creator: One Man Wolf Pack
notes: DRAFT CANDIDATE -- produced in a cloud (Cowork) session; not yet cross-checked against the live exemplars directory for duplicates at the time of drafting (a freshness check is performed immediately before commit). This is a REPLACEMENT for an earlier same-slot (Kyrgyzstan #3) candidate this session: the first candidate found for the Song-Kul/Ala-Kul search angle (channel 'Monts Célestes Trekking Kirghizstan', watch?v=uFzyyI8O8Gk) was oEmbed-verified and did corroborate as a real, established operation (dedicated website montscelestes.com, Facebook page, listed among French trekking agencies), but turned out on closer inspection to be a Bishkek-based trekking/tour company's promotional channel rather than a dedicated drone-cinematography source -- a weaker genre fit for this reference pack, so it was dropped in favor of this stronger candidate rather than included at face value. Verified this session via WebFetch of the YouTube oEmbed endpoint (https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pv7AxLej-yE&format=json), which returned title='【4K】🇰🇬 Bishkek from Above 🔥 Capital of KYRGYZSTAN 2025 🔥 Cinematic Wolf Aerial™ Drone Film', author_name='One Man Wolf Pack', author_url='https://www.youtube.com/@OneManWolfPack', provider_name='YouTube' -- confirms a real, currently-public, recently-produced (title states 2025) video. The watch-page fetch (for CC-license/upload-date/duration/description) returned HTTP 429 (rate-limited) this session, consistent with every other candidate processed this session; not retried further or worked around, so `license_category` is the conservative all-rights-reserved default on absence of a positive CC finding -- re-check when reachable. A WebSearch this session ('"One Man Wolf Pack" David Ong drone Kyrgyzstan filmmaker') found UNUSUALLY STRONG corroboration for this batch: a dedicated multi-country professional portfolio website (onemanwolfpack.de, with dedicated pages for Kyrgyzstan/Bishkek, Mongolia, and many other countries), a commercial stock-footage portfolio on Shutterstock (shutterstock.com/g/one+man+wolf+pack/video), a Facebook page, and an Instagram drone-video presence -- this is real evidence of an established, prolific, commercially-recognized professional aerial videographer, not a one-off upload, and is the strongest external corroboration found for any candidate in this session's second (4-item) batch. `award_or_showcase_provenance` is left null: no juried contest/broadcaster/festival attribution specifically was found (Shutterstock commercial licensing is a distribution channel, not an award), so this field stays null per this project's convention of reserving it for contest/broadcaster/festival provenance specifically. `scores` are `scores_provenance: manually_estimated`, calibrated close to but slightly below this pack's established-large-following creator tier (pshepfpv-iceland-glaciers-fpv.json's 0.77/0.76/0.82, which has a directly-confirmed 474K/1.1M follower count) -- reflecting strong professional/commercial legitimacy evidence but the absence of a directly-confirmed subscriber count for this channel specifically. `composite_score` is NOT a call to the repo's real `compute_composite_score`/`default_weights()` functions (no shell access to the user's local Python environment this session); it was computed via an equivalent equal-weighted-mean-of-present-signals formula run in this session's own Python: (0.76+0.75+0.78)/3 = 0.7633333333333333, rounded to 0.7633. Re-run through the real repo function before treating this figure as certified. `composition` stays null, matching Milestone 1 convention.

editorial_style.pacing_notes: Not independently reviewed via playback this session. 'long-form-cinematic' is inferred from the title convention (a branded 'Cinematic ... Drone Film' single-city aerial piece, landscape-oriented, not a /shorts/ URL) rather than an actual viewing -- correct if a live-playback review finds otherwise.
